title: cymbopogon giganteus var. densiflorus
intro: Cymbopogon giganteus var. densiflorus, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a variant of the Cymbopogon giganteus plant, a type of tall, perennial grass native to India. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of East Indian lemongrass include reducing fever, alleviating digestive problems, and providing relief from anxiety and stress. The plant is often used to prepare herbal teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be consumed or applied topically to harness its medicinal properties.
